# Total Run - Combined Results

## Interpretation Guide
- ADF p>0.05 and KPSS p<0.05 suggests I(1)-like behavior; use differences/cointegration frameworks.
- ADF p<0.05 and KPSS p>0.05 suggests stationarity; level models are more admissible.
- Ljung-Box p<0.05 indicates autocorrelation; include lag terms.
- BP/White p<0.05 indicates heteroskedasticity; use robust/HAC standard errors.
- JB p<0.05 indicates non-normality; rely on robust inference.
- Stability flag=1 indicates drift/break risk; use rolling or split-sample checks.
- For retail, compare no-promo and promo-controlled transmission.

- Tables included: 324
- Graphs included: 222

## model_discounts :: model_discounts_output.xlsx :: Discount_Strategy_Synthesis

- Category: other
- Interpretation: General output table. Interpret with module context and linked diagnostic/model outputs.
- Rows: 8
- Cols: 3

| question | answer | evidence |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Do promotions behave like equilibrium correction? | yes | Baseline Silpo ECM-style coefficients are more often negative than observed-price ones. |
| Does pseudo-asymmetry weaken after promo control? | mixed | Observed vs baseline coefficient gaps are summarized in Asymmetry_Observed_vs_Baseline. |
| Do effective prices adjust faster than baseline prices? | mixed | share_observed_ect_faster=0.18 |
| Does discount depth react to upstream shocks? | mixed | Promo_State_Depth stores HAC coefficients on FarmGate/Producer/ProZorro shocks. |
| Do retail shocks transmit materially to farm-gate prices? | yes | reverse_core_rows=32 |
| Is the retail-to-farmgate conclusion stable across farm-gate reconstructions? | yes | reverse_robust_share=1.00 |
| Is transmission stronger for product-specific panels than for all-products averages? | yes | product_core_rows=94; average_core_rows=35 |
| Do specific retailer brands show stronger or weaker transmission? | yes | brand_core_rows=55 |

## primary_chain_summary :: primary_chain_consolidated.xlsx :: Rule_Documentation

- Category: other
- Interpretation: General output table. Interpret with module context and linked diagnostic/model outputs.
- Rows: 1
- Cols: 7

| pipeline_version | primary_chain_doc | farm_gate_inputs | reconstruction_variants | core_chain | reverse_chain | benchmarks_role |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| RW4 | RW4 domestic vertical chain is FarmGateUA -> ProducerUA -> ProZorro -> Retail, estimated with both forward and reverse-flow pairs. Farm-gate enters from two alternative reconstruction workbooks and both linear/pchip interpolation variants are carried end-to-end. | farm_gate_daily.xlsx + farm_gate_all_missing_filled_daily.xlsx | linear,pchip | FarmGateUA -> ProducerUA -> ProZorro -> Retail | Retail -> ProZorro -> ProducerUA -> FarmGateUA | ConsumerUA, EU, CME are external comparison benchmarks only |
